articles.title: 2026, the horrible year of Milan's attackers: only 8 goals scored so far
articles.summary: 2026 has so far been a really complicated year for Milan's attackers who have scored just eight goals in 15 games: 4 Leao, 3 Nkunku and 1 Füllkrug, while both Pulisic and Gimenez are still without goals.
